KVK açıklaması

Based on the internationalization policy of Doğuş University, we aim for a multicultural teaching and training environment to enable a diverse set of ideas in the academy. We hold the value of investing in individuals to broaden their horizons paramount. Our hope is to thoroughly utilize the globalized world of academia to serve our mission of conducting in the frontier of science and arts.

Bilateral agreements are the bridges we build to strive toward our goals of creating a source of qualified researchers, forming an international campus environment, and enriching our international cooperations.
